sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tuipi geiah kading a, a galkhat lam ka gal-et leh,
Tuipi geiah tembaw khat a khawl ding mu ing a,
A maute a dawn dingin, alawmte tampi om veh,
It teng tawh kikhen lohna vantung hong phawk sake.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Inn lam kazuan hi, zion tembaw tungtuang in,
Galkhat pekah meiilum lakah a taang ka gal muh ta,
Hoihtakin katun mateng in, Vantungmi te aw kei hong kha aw.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kanu in nunna huihpi thuakin hong paisan khinzo a
Tawntung mun hong pi dingin, Honpa neiteh hongci
Tu’n ka telsiang khinta hi, kei zong tua mun lam kazuan ta,
Ka nu’n galah hong ngak hi, nuikawm hong dawnta ding.
